data.title: Modular Design
data.description: Microsoft.com uses a modular architecture to deliver content dynamically across its various services and platforms.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes microservices and containerization for scalability and elasticity.

data.title: Global Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: The site employs a robust CDN strategy to ensure fast content delivery across the globe.
data.technical_spec: In partnership with Azure CDN, leveraging edge servers strategically located worldwide.

data.title: Server-side Rendering with Progressive Enhancement
data.description: Optimizes first load speed and maintains an enhanced experience using progressive enhancement techniques.
data.technical_spec: Combines server-side rendering with client-side React components.

data.title: API-Centric Architecture
data.description: Depends heavily on APIs to integrate and interact with varied Microsoft services ensuring cohesive user experiences.
data.technical_spec: RESTful and GraphQL API implementations for robust service interactivity.

data.title: Secure Communication Channels
data.description: Emphasizes security through encrypted communication and data protection.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2/1.3 for all HTTP operations, OAuth 2.0 for user authentication.
